creator: scottro11@gmail.com
text:
Firstly, if everyone got a blank, or possibly two blank emails from me,
I apologize, misconfiguration of opera.

This patch worked for me as well. I don't use moused, and I have psm0 as
my device.  However, the scroll wheel wasn't working with it in FreeBSD
7.  If I started moused, then used /dev/sysmouse in xorg.conf, rather
than my preferred psm0, it would work. 

After applying the patch, both work. So, this patch worked quite well
for me. 

Thanks for all your efforts.


-- 
Scott Robbins
